summary: Excellent audience recording of the Eugene show with solid song selection and minimal crowd noise.
review: The audience‑sourced tape captures a clear, high‑quality sound with very little background noise, making it pleasant to listen to. Reviewers also praised the nice song selection, indicating an overall enjoyable performance despite the lack of detailed set notes.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review is available; it praises both the recording fidelity and the song selection, leading to a solid but not exceptional overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear audio with very little background audience noise; high‑fidelity audience capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer notes a nice song selection, suggesting a well‑curated set despite no specific track details.
